display_text: Boots of Travel 2, Cost: 4500: Upgrades your Town Portal Scroll, allowing it to target allied heroes and units, reduces cooldown, and does not consume a charge on usage. Essential for global map presence and split-pushing late game. Stats: MS: +110, TP Cooldown: 40s, TP Channel Time: 2s, TP Range: 800.

display_text: Boots of Travel 2, Cost: 4500: Enables split-pushing by allowing safe, instant teleportation to any allied creep or hero across the map. Critical for ratting strategies and responding to enemy pushes, maximizing map pressure. Its low channel time allows for rapid reaction and escapes.

display_text: Boots of Travel 2, Cost: 4500: Synergizes with heroes who have global abilities (Spectre, Nature's Prophet) or need to split-push (Tinker, Ember Spirit). Core on hard carries and mobile cores who must farm across the map and join fights instantly late game.

display_text: Boots of Travel 2, Cost: 4500: Exceptional utility for team fights, enabling buyback-teleport plays to rejoin battles instantly. Its ability to target heroes allows for saves and repositioning of allies during fights, turning buybacks into immediate fight-winning power.
